title: Sanae Takaichi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Sanae Takaichi is a Japanese politician who has been Prime Minister of Japan and President of the Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) since October 2025.

title: Shinzō Abe becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Shinzo Abe was a Japanese statesman and politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan and President of the Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) from 2006 to 2007 and again from 2012 to 2020.

title: Hideki Tojo becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Hideki Tojo was a Japanese military officer and politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1941 to 1944 during World War II.

title: Shigeru Ishiba becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Shigeru Ishiba is a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan and President of the Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) from 2024 until his resignation in 2025.

title: Ichirō Hatoyama becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Ichirō Hatoyama was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1954 to 1956.

title: Yoshihide Suga becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Yoshihide Suga is a Japanese former politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 2020 to 2021.

title: Fumimaro Konoe becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Prince Fumimaro Konoe was a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1937 to 1939 and from 1940 to 1941.

title: Itō Hirobumi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Prince Itō Hirobumi was a Japanese statesman who served as the first prime minister of Japan from 1885 to 1888.

title: Shigeru Yoshida becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Shigeru Yoshida was a Japanese diplomat and politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1946 to 1947 and again from 1948 to 1954, serving through most of the country's occupation after World War II.

title: Junichiro Koizumi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Junichiro Koizumi is a Japanese retired politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan and president of the Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) from 2001 to 2006.

title: Nobusuke Kishi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Nobusuke Kishi was a Japanese bureaucrat and politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1957 to 1960.

title: Tarō Asō becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Tarō Asō is a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 2008 to 2009.

title: Naoto Kan becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Naoto Kan is a Japanese former politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan and President of the Democratic Party of Japan (DPJ) from June 2010 to September 2011.

title: Yoshihiko Noda becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Yoshihiko Noda is a Japanese politician who served as the Prime Minister of Japan from 2011 to 2012.

title: Naruhiko Higashikuni becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Naruhiko, Prince Higashikuni was a member of the Japanese imperial family and general of the army who served as prime minister of Japan from 17 August 1945 until his resignation two months later on 9 October.

title: Yukio Hatoyama becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Yukio Hatoyama is a retired Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan and leader of the Democratic Party of Japan from 2009 to 2010.

title: Kantarō Suzuki becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Baron Kantarō Suzuki was a Japanese politician and admiral who served as prime minister of Japan from 7 April to 17 August 1945, during World War II.

title: Yamagata Aritomo becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Prince Yamagata Aritomo was a Japanese statesman and general who twice served as prime minister of Japan, in 1889–1891 and 1898–1900.

title: Tomiichi Murayama becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Tomiichi Murayama was a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1994 to 1996.

title: Kuniaki Koiso becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Kuniaki Koiso was a Japanese politician and general who served as prime minister of Japan from 1944 to 1945, during World War II.

title: Morihiro Hosokawa becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Morihiro Hosokawa is a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1993 to 1994.

title: Kakuei Tanaka becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Kakuei Tanaka was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1972 to 1974.

title: Yasuo Fukuda becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Yasuo Fukuda is a Japanese former politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 2007 to 2008.

title: Eisaku Satō becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Eisaku Satō was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1964 to 1972.

title: Inukai Tsuyoshi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Inukai Tsuyoshi was a Japanese statesman who served as prime minister of Japan from 1931 to his assassination in 1932.

title: Yasuhiro Nakasone becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Yasuhiro Nakasone was a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1982 to 1987.

title: Kōki Hirota becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Kōki Hirota was a Japanese diplomat and politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1936 to 1937.

title: Yoshirō Mori becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Yoshirō Mori is a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan and President of the Liberal Democratic Party from 2000 to 2001.

title: Hara Takashi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Hara Takashi, informally known as Hara Kei, was a Japanese politician who served as the Prime Minister of Japan from 1918 until his assassination.

title: Kiichi Miyazawa becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Kiichi Miyazawa was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1991 to 1993.

title: Yamamoto Gonnohyōe becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Yamamoto Gonbē, also called Gonnohyōe, was an admiral in the Imperial Japanese Navy and twice Prime Minister of Japan from 1913 to 1914 and again from 1923 to 1924.

title: Ryutaro Hashimoto becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Ryutaro Hashimoto was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1996 to 1998.

title: Nobuyuki Abe becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: General Nobuyuki Abe was a general in the Imperial Japanese Army, Prime Minister of Japan, and the last Governor-General of Korea.

title: Kijūrō Shidehara becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Baron Kijūrō Shidehara, was a Japanese diplomat and politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1945 to 1946.

title: Hayato Ikeda becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Hayato Ikeda was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1960 to 1964.

title: Katsura Tarō becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Prince Katsura Tarō was a Japanese statesman and general who served as prime minister of Japan from 1901 to 1906, from 1908 to 1911, and from 1912 to 1913.

title: Mitsumasa Yonai becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Mitsumasa Yonai was a Japanese navy officer and politician.

title: Saionji Kinmochi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Prince Saionji Kinmochi was a Japanese statesman and diplomat who twice served as Prime Minister of Japan, in 1906–1908 and 1911–1912.

title: Takahashi Korekiyo becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Viscount Takahashi Korekiyo was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1921 to 1922 and Minister of Finance when he was assassinated.

title: Noboru Takeshita becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Noboru Takeshita was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1987 to 1989.

title: Keizō Obuchi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Keizō Obuchi was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1998 to 2000.

title: Saitō Makoto becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Viscount Saitō Makoto was a Japanese admiral and politician who was prime minister of Japan from 1932 to 1934.

title: Tanzan Ishibashi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Tanzan Ishibashi was a Japanese journalist and politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1956 to 1957.

title: Tetsu Katayama becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Tetsu Katayama was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1947 to 1948.

title: Ōkuma Shigenobu becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Marquess Ōkuma Shigenobu was a Japanese statesman who was a leading figure in the Meiji and Taishō eras of Japan, serving as Prime Minister in 1898, and from 1914 to 1916.

title: Keisuke Okada becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Keisuke Okada was a Japanese admiral and statesman who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1934 to 1936.

title: Terauchi Masatake becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Count Terauchi Masatake was a Japanese military officer and politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1916 to 1918.

title: Takeo Fukuda becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Takeo Fukuda was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1976 to 1978.

title: Takeo Miki becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Takeo Miki was a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1974 to 1976.

title: Toshiki Kaifu becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Toshiki Kaifu was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1989 to 1991.

title: Hiranuma Kiichirō becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Baron Kiichirō Hiranuma was a Japanese lawyer and politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan in 1939.

title: Masayoshi Ōhira becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Masayoshi Ōhira was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1978 until his death in 1980.

title: Tsutomu Hata becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Tsutomu Hata was a Japanese politician who briefly served as prime minister of Japan in 1994.

title: Wakatsuki Reijirō becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Baron Wakatsuki Reijirō, was a Japanese politician who twice served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1926 to 1927, and again in 1931.

title: Senjūrō Hayashi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Senjūrō Hayashi was a Japanese politician and general.

title: Zenkō Suzuki becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Zenkō Suzuki was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan from 1980 to 1982.

title: Kuroda Kiyotaka becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Count Kuroda Kiyotaka was a Japanese politician and general who served as prime minister of Japan from 1888 to 1889.

title: Sōsuke Uno becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Sōsuke Uno was a Japanese politician who served as prime minister of Japan in 1989.

title: Tanaka Giichi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Baron Tanaka Giichi was a Japanese general and politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1927 to 1929.

title: Hamaguchi Osachi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Hamaguchi Osachi was a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1929 to 1931.

title: Matsukata Masayoshi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Prince Matsukata Masayoshi was a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan from 1891 to 1892, and from 1896 to 1898.

title: Hitoshi Ashida becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Hitoshi Ashida was a Japanese politician who served as Prime Minister of Japan in 1948.

title: Katō Takaaki becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Count Katō Takaaki, also known as Katō Kōmei, was a Japanese politician, diplomat, and Prime Minister of Japan from 1924 until his death on 28 January 1926, during the period which historians have called "Taishō Democracy".

title: Katō Tomosaburō becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Marshal-Admiral Viscount Katō Tomosaburō was a career officer in the Imperial Japanese Navy, cabinet minister, and Prime Minister of Japan from 1922 to 1923.

title: Sanjō Sanetomi becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Prince Sanjō Sanetomi was a Japanese Imperial court noble and statesman at the time of the Meiji Restoration.

title: Kiyoura Keigo becomes prime minister of Japan
fact: Count Kiyoura Keigo was a Japanese politician.
